modules.name: 库存管理
modules.en: 出入库联动+状态流转+图表。

reasoning: 原生表格 + 图表 + 状态流转按钮,库存出入库联动。
R1 通过,本轮未改动;仅重截最新截图。
裸 skill 复刻第 1 轮:仅给业务需求+原型 URL 自主跑完。库存看板=KPI 卡条+出入库趋势图+低库存预警表+按类别价值环图,实时聚合台账与流水。
裸 skill 复刻第 2 轮迭代:补齐预警阈值色阶+趋势分段(7/30/90 天)+按类别价值环图细化,看板信息密度贴近原型。
DeepSeek pro 裸 skill 一句话需求一轮复刻;库存看板搭出 KPI 条+Top Movers 排行表+按时交付率条+补货预警表,实时聚合台账,结构与原型对齐(自评 7/10)。
AI 视觉判分 5.0/10:KPI卡缺、图表空占位;预警/movers退化为明细列表。

minimal-dspro.label: 极简·小白·DS-Pro
minimal-dspro.note: fable14232·零skill提示·只给「建到14232+用nb cli」·deepseek-v4-pro·测「能否自发现技能并搭出」(2026-06-11)

reasoning: 零 skill 提示的极简 prompt(只给「建到 14232 + 用 nb cli」)。ds-pro 自主调起 nocobase-app-discipline + WebFetch 原型,端到端建 5 表 6 页,env 纪律到位(自带 -e),踩 alpha 坑自恢复,种子甚至照搬原型精确 KPI($2.84M/1486/38/4.7x)。但只走通用 CRUD —— 招牌页=一行文字 KPI + 3 张光表,无图表、无区域拆解(everything-is-a-table)。证明「能自发现技能 + 建出能用后台」,但拿不到原型保真。该页已清理用于下一轮复测。
r1.actualPrompt:
I have NocoBase running locally at http://localhost:14232. The nb CLI is installed and this instance is the default env, so you can drive it with `nb` commands (e.g. `nb api ...`). Please build the following app directly in that instance, end to end:

Build a NocoBase app — Inventory Management: inbound/outbound linkage, status transitions, and summary charts. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/01-inventory-management.html

When you're done, tell me the collections you created and the URL of the main page.

reasoning: 改两处 skill 路由后复测:app-discipline 加「prompt 有原型 URL→招牌页交 prototype-repro」;prototype-repro 描述改「有原型就触发,build 这词不取消原型」。同一需求 + 发布版前言(端到端自主、别停确认):prototype-repro 被正确拉起、真按 region→block 拆原型 —— KPI 卡 + 趋势图块 + Reorder/Top Movers/Supplier 面板组成看板网格,布局对上原型(v1→本轮天壤之别)。执行半成:趋势图配错(状态柱非时间折线)、缺类目环图、Reorder/Supplier 面板空、Top Movers 退化为表。⚠️ 中间一版「只改 skill 未加前言」停在 prototype-repro 的 ▣ 确认门、一张表没建 —— 暴露其交互确认门在「粘一段就走」的非交互场景会卡死,必须靠前言冲过(或给 skill 加无人确认时的自主逃生口)。

modules.name: 资产管理
modules.en: 资产卡三段式+折旧进度条+维保。

reasoning: List + JSField 卡片网格 + 左分面 + 顶部 pill,整体形似但卡片内部结构与原型有差。
r1.userNote: 看看能不能加一个类似的纯色 HTML+icon 占据上部,然后中间可以是原生字段,最下面进度条左右占满,这样会好看一些。

reasoning: 卡片三段式重构:上部按分类配色横幅(antd 图标+分类名+编号胶囊),中部原生字段风格 label+value 行,底部贴边折旧进度条(左右占满)。
删除 6 个原生兄弟字段(remove-node 后验证 nodeMap 真删);资产种子 4→16 条全分类覆盖,网格不再空旷。

design.label: 设计稿线
design.note: expagents 设计稿线实验,实例已清(截图存档)

reasoning: 做法:先按拆解语法产设计稿(数据模型+区域→区块映射),再照稿搭。资产目录招牌页=左 facet 多选分面(分类/库位复选+计数+取值滑块)+ 工具栏状态 pill + List+JSField 富卡片(渐变头+折旧进度条+负责人头像+收藏心)+ 点卡开原生抽屉(明细+维护/转移子表)。建 6 张表 16 条资产覆盖全状态。
结论:核心区域全部搭出且联动正常,3 列自适应卡片网格、跨块筛选(facets/pills/range/search 命名 group)、抽屉子表都跑通,视觉≈设计稿,属设计稿线里 4 好之一。
卡点:卡头缺按分类的设备插画(用纯渐变替代);自动生成的抽屉 Details 有几处字段名对不上(acquired_at→acquired_date 等);结果计数靠 500ms 轮询 list resource。
裸 skill 复刻第 1 轮:资产目录招牌页=左分类筛选+卡片网格(卡内折旧进度条)+点卡开抽屉,核心布局结构对齐。
裸 skill 复刻第 2 轮迭代:卡片三段式重构(配色头+原生字段中段+底部折旧条),分面计数与取值滑块联动收敛。
DeepSeek pro 裸 skill 一句话需求一轮复刻;资产目录用 GridCard 出 24 张渐变头富卡(分类配色+折旧进度条+负责人头像),卡片本体贴近原型,缺左侧多选分面侧栏。
AI 视觉判分 8.5/10:彩色资产卡+价值进度条+状态对齐;缺左侧分类筛选栏。

r1.actualPrompt:
帮我在 NocoBase 复刻这个原型:面试管理——面试官:日程+评分卡+对比。 参考原型(OSS):https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/43-candidate-management.html

[环境] NocoBase env `appslib`(http://127.0.0.1:14220,nb CLI 已配)。写操作用 `nb api <...> -e appslib -y`;截图用 Playwright 全新浏览器,UI 登录 admin@nocobase.com / *** 拿 token 注入 localStorage。
**已装优化版 `nocobase-prototype-repro` skill 在 ~/.agents/skills/nocobase-prototype-repro/ —— 先读 SKILL.md(Router / Non-Goals / Region→block 表 / Hard rules)+ references/(spec-template、block-recipes、gotchas、visual-loop)全部读完再动手。**
原型 HTML 末尾内嵌 `<script type="application/nb-spec+json">` 权威规格(集合/字段/页面/招牌区块),先 curl 读它再建——它是唯一事实源,严格照建。 集合前缀用 `cdm_`。
端到端**完整**搭(数据建模 + 英文种子覆盖所有枚举/状态各≥1行 + 每个集合列表页 + 招牌视图/看板),视觉环:截图 ↔ 原型对照自查,对齐到 **≥8 成**才算完成,招牌区块为空绝不算完成。
[截图主题] 系统是**深色主题**——截图前确保深色主题已生效且页面完全渲染再截,框住招牌视图主体内容,**不要出现大片白屏/浅色空白**(之前白底截图在深色系统里很难看)。
最后报告:collection 清单、招牌页 pageUid、自评分(必须写明一行 "Self-Score: X/10")、与原型的对比观察、踩的坑。

modules.name: 原生CRM(自规划)
modules.en: 清晰页面规划+原生块(不强推JS)搭完整CRM·plus vs max对照。
modules.desc: Native CRM from a page plan (no JS) — qwen plus vs max
modules.prompt: Build a native NocoBase CRM from a clear PAGE PLAN, native blocks only (no JS): collections customers / contacts / deals(stage enum lead→won/lost) / activities. Pages: (1) Dashboard = native Chart blocks (deals by stage, amount, by owner pie) + closing-soon table; (2) Pipeline = Kanban by stage + table; (3) Customers = table + drawer with contacts & deals sub-tables; (4) Contacts = table + activities sub-table; (5) Activities = Calendar + table. Tests whether a well-planned native prompt (no JS push) yields a complete CRM — qwen-plus vs qwen-max.

bench-qplus-crm.label: 原生CRM·plus
bench-qplus-crm.note: qwen-plus · 正常提示+清晰页面规划 · 原生块(不强推JS) · OpenCode Zen Go

reasoning: qwen-plus:清晰页面规划+原生块指引(不提JS),22分钟一次过搭出完整5页原生CRM——Dashboard原生Chart(柱+柱+分色饼)+closing-soon/recent表,Pipeline看板+表,Customers/Contacts表,Activities日历+表,抽屉带子表联动。块选对、质量好、过程干净。
r1.prompt:
Build a lightweight CRM in NocoBase, FULL AUTONOMY — no questions, do it end to end. Build into env **crmnative** — every nb api call uses `-e crmnative -y`. The instance is a CLEAN empty NocoBase.

DATA MODEL — snake_case collections; belongsTo/relation fields named as NOUNS (e.g. `customer`, `contact`, `owner`), NEVER ending in `_id` (beta rejects `*_id` association names):
- crm_customers: name, industry (single-select enum), size (enum: SMB / Mid-Market / Enterprise), website, status (enum: prospect / active / churned), owner (belongsTo users)
- crm_contacts: name, email, phone, title, customer (belongsTo crm_customers), owner (belongsTo users)
- crm_deals: title, customer (belongsTo crm_customers), contact (belongsTo crm_contacts), stage (enum: lead / qualified / proposal / negotiation / won / lost), amount (number, ¥ prefix, 2 decimals), expected_close (date), owner (belongsTo users)
- crm_activities: subject, type (enum: call / email / meeting / task), due (date), done (checkbox), deal (belongsTo crm_deals), contact (belongsTo crm_contacts)

SEED all-English data: ≥8 customers, ≥12 contacts, ≥16 deals covering EVERY stage (incl. won & lost), ≥24 activities covering every type, with realistic owners/amounts/dates.

PAGES — use native NocoBase blocks only (Table / Kanban / Calendar / Details / Form / Chart). Put everything under a top-level "CRM" menu group. Plan per page:

1. Dashboard — a sales overview built from NATIVE Chart blocks (use the Chart builder block):
   - Deals count by stage (bar or funnel)
   - Pipeline amount by stage, or amount by expected_close month (bar/line)
   - Deals by owner (pie)
   - plus a Table block "Closing soon" (crm_deals sorted by expected_close ascending, stage not won/lost) and/or "Recent activities".
2. Pipeline — a Kanban of crm_deals grouped by `stage` (cards show title + customer + amount), AND a Table view of all deals with Filter + Add. Row/card click → drawer: deal Details + an Activities sub-table (that deal) + the linked contact.
3. Customers — Table + Filter + Add new. Row click → a WIDE drawer: customer Details + a Contacts sub-table + a Deals sub-table (both scoped to that customer).
4. Contacts — Table (with a Customer column) + Filter + Add. Row click → drawer: Details + an Activities sub-table.
5. Activities — a Calendar view (by `due`) AND a Table; Filter by type and by done; row click → drawer with Details.

Build it like a real product CRM a NocoBase consultant would ship — clean, populated, navigable. Sub-tables in drawers must auto-filter to the parent record. When done, report the page schemaUid(s) and a one-line summary of what each page contains.

bench-qmax-crm.label: 原生CRM·max
bench-qmax-crm.note: qwen-max · 同任务对照 · 撞 flow-surfaces 校验+Zen 5h用量上限

reasoning: qwen-max同任务:也搭出完整5页、结构等同(Dashboard原生Chart+Pipeline看板+Customers/Contacts表+Activities日历+抽屉子表)。但明显更慢更卡——反复撞flow-surfaces字段组校验、烧到188K context、被监控nudge才脱困、最后撞Zen 5小时用量上限;Dashboard饼图渲染成纯色圆(小数据问题)。结论:结构与plus打平,效率/稳健plus明显胜。
